name: video-to-post
description: Desktop MVP for converting videos into mixed image-text post drafts.
author: OpenAI Codex

scripts.build:python: pyinstaller --onefile --name export_draft_docx scripts\export_draft_docx.py && pyinstaller --onefile --name import_word_docx scripts\import_word_docx.py && powershell -NoProfile -Command "New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path resources\python | Out-Null; Copy-Item -Path dist\export_draft_docx.exe -Destination resources\python\export_draft_docx.exe -Force; Copy-Item -Path dist\import_word_docx.exe -Destination resources\python\import_word_docx.exe -Force"
scripts.dist:win: npm run build:python && npm run build && electron-builder --win nsis
